locator.name: You are not connected to a Wi-Fi network.
Connect to a Wi-Fi network to enable Wi-Fi sharing and share your connected network.
1. Make sure your Wi-Fi setting is on and Airplane mode is Off.

locator.xpath: //*[@Name='1. Make sure your Wi-Fi setting is on and Airplane mode is Off.']/*

locator.name: 3. Share your network via scanning the generated QR code.

locator.xpath: (//*[@Name='3. Share your network via scanning the generated QR code.']/*)[1]/following-sibling::*
(//*[@Name='3. Share your network via scanning the generated QR code.']/*)[2]/following-sibling::*
